ogTitle: Bohena Creek vs Bohnock: Climate Safety

heading: Bohena Creek vs Bohnock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bohena Creek, New South Wales and Bohnock, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bohnock has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bohena Creek (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bohena Creek or Bohnock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bohena Creek has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Bohnock scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bohena Creek scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Bohnock scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bohena Creek or Bohnock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bohnock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
